questions.q: What is the order (number of elements) of the cyclic group Z₆?
What is the molecular formula of benzene?
The P vs NP problem asks whether:
choices: Exponential-time problems can always be solved in polynomial time
Deterministic algorithms can simulate probabilistic ones
Problems whose solutions can be quickly verified can also be quickly solved
Parallel computing eliminates all computational hardness

questions.q: The Maclaurin series for e^x equals:

A woman shoots her husband, then holds him underwater for 5 minutes. An hour later they dine together. How?
choices: She is a photographer — she shot a photo and developed it in a darkroom

choices: They are a grandfather, a father, and a son
